title: ResponseBufferTooSmall variant name wrong for >2GiB buffer case
description: connection.rs line 41: c_int::try_from(rsp.len()) failure returns Error::ResponseBufferTooSmall. The doc comment acknowledges this (buffer length overflows c_int > 2 GiB), but a caller passing a 3 GiB buffer will see 'response buffer too small' which is the opposite of what happened. Suggested rewrite: add a separate variant Error::BufferSizeOverflow (or Error::ResponseBufferTooLarge) for the overflow case, and reserve ResponseBufferTooSmall for when the buffer is actually too small for the response.
